title: Trouble adding 3rd party app to multiple boards
excerpt: I have just started working with Autoboost and love its features.  However when I try to add it to a second board Monday simply spins and spins and does not allow me to activate the app for use on the second board.  Plea…

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml: I have just started working with Autoboost and love its features. However when I try to add it to a second board Monday simply spins and spins and does not allow me to activate the app for use on the second board. Please help.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Since it’s a third party app - have you reached out to the app developer for support? Boost Apps | Leading monday.com Marketplace Solutions

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
There seem to be some problems with monday right now.

But how are you adding it to the board?

posts.author: JRooney (Jennifer Rooney)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a meeting with them this morning. Hoping it will resolve the issue.
